ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each audit log entry
ID of the user making the change
Date when the change was made
Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete)
